sections.title: Talking to him before offering yourself as a sacrifice

lines.speaker: Zul-Urgish
lines.text: Puny human show respect to Zulrah or I smash you head.

lines.speaker: Zul-Urgish
lines.text: Zulrah the great god. He mighty. You go see High Priestess, she tell you lots and lots.

sections.title: Using the Zul-Andra deposit chest before offering yourself as a sacrifice

lines.speaker: Zul-Urgish
lines.text: You leave that alone, human. You not one of us.

lines.speaker: Zul-Urgish
lines.text: Human agreed to sacrifice [himself/herself] to mighty Zulrah! We all most grateful.
